achievements.notes: Defeat the final boss at Terra Tower

achievements.notes: Complete the game with a good ending

achievements.notes: Collect all shop-available items

achievements.notes: Collect all weapons

achievements.title: General Kid
achievements.description: [Ending 4] Defeat Time Devourer in a "New Game+" and watch this ending
achievements.notes: Collect all accessories

achievements.description: [Ending 5] Defeat Time Devourer in a "New Game+" and watch this ending
achievements.notes: Collect all armor

achievements.title: Magical Dreamers

achievements.description: [Ending 8] Defeat Time Devourer in a "New Game+" and watch this ending

achievements.notes: Complete the Viper Manor infiltration without being detected

achievements.title: Wicked Deeds
achievements.description: [Ending 12] Defeat Time Devourer in a "New Game+" and watch this ending
achievements.notes: Defeat the Dead Head boss on the S.S. Invincible

achievements.title: Escape Your Nightmare
achievements.description: Complete intro without getting into any fight
achievements.notes: Climb Terra Tower

achievements.title: Desperate Love
achievements.description: Help a desperate boy with his problem
achievements.notes: Help the boy at the bar in Termina (Home World)

achievements.title: Whaddaya Want Already!?
achievements.description: Obtain two gifts by just being annoying
achievements.notes: Annoy the lady in Termina (Home World) until you get gifts

achievements.title: The Path of the Rocker
achievements.description: Infiltrate Viper Manor with the help of Nikki
achievements.notes: In Termina, choose to follow Nikki (rocker path) to Viper Manor

achievements.title: Ze Path of ze Swordsman
achievements.description: Infiltrate Viper Manor with the help of Pierre
achievements.notes: In Termina, choose to follow Pierre (swordsman path) to Viper Manor

achievements.title: The Path of the Magician
achievements.description: Infiltrate Viper Manor with the help of Guile
achievements.notes: In Termina, choose to follow Guile (magician path) to Viper Manor

achievements.title: King Moaman
achievements.description: Defeat KingMoaman before his minions [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Defeat KingMoaman before his minions in the Marbule quest

achievements.title: Dragon Feeder
achievements.description: Obtain all awards up to 40 feeds in dragon feeding pens
achievements.notes: Feed dragons on the S.S. Invincible (100 feeds)

achievements.title: Master Dragon Feeder
achievements.description: Feed 100 dragons [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Feed 100 dragons on the S.S. Invincible without failure

achievements.title: Overcooked
achievements.description: Feed at least 80 dragons without any failure  [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Feed dragons on S.S. Invincible — feed 80 without failure

achievements.title: The Gambler
achievements.description: Help Guile win the contest he enterted with his friend
achievements.notes: Win the Grand Slam at the S.S. Zelbess casino

achievements.title: The Peacekeepers
achievements.description: Remove Quadffid in shadow forest without harming it
achievements.notes: Complete the optional Guldove sidequest with Orcha

achievements.title: The Paradox
achievements.description: Have Leena meet herself from another world
achievements.notes: Complete the optional Hydra Marshes revisit

achievements.title: The Pursuit of Dreams
achievements.description: Help a waitress fulfil her forgotten dream
achievements.notes: Defeat Highwayman and solve the Highway Ruins puzzle

achievements.title: Hasta La Beeba Baby
achievements.description: Defeat Bubba or Bobba Beeba in Hydra Marshes before either of them call for help a 2nd time [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Defeat the Beeba enemies at Earth Dragon Isle

achievements.title: Winged Centipede
achievements.description: Defeat Wingapede in Hydra Marshes while everyone in party is poisoned [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Defeat the Winged Centipede at Isle of the Damned

achievements.title: Madam Pentapus
achievements.description: Defeat Pentapus in a blue field without using anything other that blue elements or attack (no casualties) [Normal Game Only]
achievements.notes: Defeat Pentapus at Forbidden Island with blue-only restrictions

achievements.title: Rebaptism
achievements.description: For a hero the only thing worse than bad health is a bad name so find a way to change that
achievements.notes: Use the Name Plate item at the El Nido Triangle to change name

achievements.title: Riding to Kids Rescue
achievements.description: Help Kid recover from her illness
achievements.notes: Help Kid recover from the Hydra poison after Fort Dragonia

achievements.title: Indecisive Leader
achievements.description: Send Korcha for a swim after he join you permanently
achievements.notes: After Kid recovers, send Korcha swimming

achievements.title: I Lost My Glasses, but I Need My Glasses to Find My Glasses
achievements.description: Defeat Harle after you have stolen her Moon Glasses
achievements.notes: Steal Moon Glasses from Harle then defeat her at Fort Dragonia

achievements.title: Hi-Ho
achievements.description: Defeat Hi-Ho Tank in Water Dragon Isle without killing the Dwarfs [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Complete the optional Arni Village revisit with Poshul

achievements.title: Endangered Species
achievements.description: Discover something unknown about hydras that only a fairy could see
achievements.notes: Discover something about Hydras with Razzly in your party

achievements.title: Fairy Savior
achievements.description: Keep Rosetta alive at Water Dragon Isle and obtain a reward (Wisp Cape)
achievements.notes: Save the fairies at Water Dragon Isle with Razzly

achievements.title: You Just Have to Have Faith
achievements.description: You left Kid in the hands of fate. Have at least some dignity to see if she is still alive or not
achievements.notes: Choose NOT to help Kid recover from poison and check if she survives

achievements.title: Firewalkers
achievements.description: Open all chests and complete all events in Mt. Pyre without using the Ice Breath to freeze any lava spot [Normal Game Only]
achievements.notes: Complete the Mt. Pyre revisit without taking fire damage

achievements.title: Red Hot Chili Peppor
achievements.description: Finish Solt and Pepor in Mt. Pyre but you are allowed to defeat by yourself only one of them [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Defeat Peppor and Solt with fire-only attacks at Fort Dragonia

achievements.title: Youu are Welcome
achievements.description: Teach Starky about human life
achievements.notes: After recruiting Starky, talk to the dragon at Sky Dragon Isle

achievements.title: Beating the Unbeatable
achievements.description: Obtain Rank 1 prize in casino at S.S. Zelbess (Rainbow Shell)
achievements.notes: Defeat the Criosphinx at Forbidden Island

achievements.title: I Have No Eyes but Once Could See
achievements.description: Defeat Highwayman with everyone in party blinded [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Defeat Highwayman at Highway Ruins with entire party blinded

achievements.title: Codename Lavos
achievements.description: Read a report from the future
achievements.notes: Read a report about Lavos in Chronopolis

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Obtain every treasure in dead sea (world map and subareas)
achievements.notes: Obtain all treasure chest key items across both worlds

achievements.title: The Price of Immortality
achievements.description: Defeat Miguel in Tower of Geddon without any casualties [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Complete the Skelly sidequest and recruit him

achievements.title: A Mother's Sacrifice
achievements.description: Even a dragon need to feel at least once the power of a mothers love
achievements.notes: Save Kid from the Hydra poison (choose to help her)

achievements.title: The Importance of Saving
achievements.description: Have Van learn the importance of the statement money can't buy happiness
achievements.notes: Use a Save Point for the first time and understand its importance

achievements.title: The Dark Side of a Cook
achievements.description: Defeat Hell's Cook in Viper Manor before he heal with SpiceOfLife [Normal Game Only - not NG+]
achievements.notes: Complete Orcha's dark side quest in Marbule

achievements.title: You Already Forgot but I'll Always Remember
achievements.description: Obtain a Forget-me-not Pot from someone else pocket

achievements.description: Defeat Black Dragon
achievements.notes: Complete an early morning event in Termina (Home World)

achievements.description: Defeat Dario in Forbidden Island
achievements.notes: Complete the Death's Door dungeon

achievements.title: Thou Wish To Fight?
